known_issue: Legacy CMMS exports still show CWP-03 and P-203.
notes: Use CWP-3 for pump body, casing, impeller, and seal records.

known_issue: Alignment work orders sometimes record only motor tag even when the coupling and pump train were in scope.
notes: Motor-only electrical readings must not be used to close pump/coupling alignment.

known_issue: Coupling spider replacement does not validate laser alignment.
notes: Use for WO records involving spider replacement, coupling dust, or guard drain mist.

location: 2 m upstream of pump suction flange
known_issue: Differential taps were not installed until 2026-05-10 14:30.
notes: Do not invent strainer differential before both upstream and downstream pressure taps are available.

location: discharge header downstream of check valve
known_issue: Loop card was 4-20 mA = 0-1500 gpm; BAS point used 0-2000 gpm until 2026-05-15 10:05.
notes: Pre-2026-05-15 BAS flow values need scaling cross-check against loop sheet and ultrasonic field meter.

legacy_alias: TT-CT2FAN-DE display label; BAS temp AI-4209
known_issue: BAS display label incorrectly showed CT-2 fan DE bearing from 2026-05-07 through 2026-05-12.
notes: High temperature belongs to CWP-3 drive-end bearing, not GB-CT2.

legacy_alias: Tower cell 2; CT02; condenser tower B cell
known_issue: Tower approach can contribute to high condenser-water temperature but does not explain pump 1x vibration.
notes: Use for basin, fill, spray, approach, and drift eliminator records.

legacy_alias: CT2 gearbox; CT-2 fan drive; GB-204
known_issue: Operator notes sometimes call TT-CWP3-DE a tower fan bearing because of the BAS label error.
notes: Gearbox vibration and oil evidence must be evaluated separately from CWP-3 bearing temperature.

legacy_alias: tower bypass valve; BV-CT2; mod valve 204
location: tower bypass header downstream of CWP discharge
normal_service: maintain condenser-water temperature and bypass during low load
known_issue: BAS trend records valve position, but no stem travel calibration is attached in this package.
notes: Use BAS command/feedback only as trend evidence unless mechanical stroke verification is present.

legacy_alias: seal flush panel; flush station 3; SFP-203
asset_type: local seal-flush panel with filter and pressure gauge
normal_service: seal flush supply to CWP-3 inboard seal
known_issue: Local flush gauge PI-SFP-CWP3 installed only on 2026-05-10 16:20.
notes: Seal-flush adequacy before 2026-05-10 16:20 is unresolved unless a temporary gauge reading exists.

known_issue: Operator rounds noted handle checked open by sight; no travel verification.
notes: Cannot explain low flow unless valve travel obstruction is measured.

known_issue: No closed-position conflict in evidence window.
notes: Included for tag cross-reference and valve lockout notes.

known_issue: Suction pressure in BAS is verified against field gauge on 2026-05-13.
notes: Used with discharge pressure for TDH calculation.

known_issue: Elevation correction is +3.0 ft from suction gauge to discharge gauge centerline.
notes: TDH calculation must apply elevation correction where provided.

known_issue: Installed after several early low-flow alarms.
notes: Records before 2026-05-10 14:30 must say no measured strainer differential.

normal_service: cooling load served by condenser-water loop
known_issue: Two trip records occur during CWP-3 low-flow alarms.
notes: Chiller trip is an impact indicator, not a pump failure mode by itself.

known_issue: No trip attributed to CH-2 during evidence window.
notes: Used as comparator for condenser-water loop impact.

known_issue: Basin screen debris can increase suction strainer loading downstream.
notes: Correlate basin debris with STR-CWP-3 debris rather than assuming pump internal failure.

known_issue: Used to check FT-CWP3 scaling before BAS correction.
notes: Valid records require strap spacing note and technician initials.

known_issue: BAS point labels and scaling lagged field corrections for FT-CWP3 and TT-CWP3-DE.
notes: BAS trends are usable after tag and scaling reconciliation.
